characters.appearance: Young Asian male, slim build, fair complexion. He has short, straight black hair parted slightly off-center. His facial features are smooth with dark eyes.
characters.wardrobe: A plain, light grey short-sleeved t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially expresses frustration, transitioning to a confident and informative tone.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Honestly, office में मेरी poor English ने मेरा confidence बिल्कुल तोड़ दिया था। [Honestly, my poor English at the office had completely broken my confidence.]
Character A says: हर meeting में मुझे पता होता था कि क्या बोलना है, but words ही बाहर नहीं आते थे... जब तक मुझे सही solution नहीं मिला। [In every meeting I knew what to say, but the words just wouldn't come out... until I found the right solution.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a highly relatable pain point: losing confidence at work due to poor spoken English.
- Builds empathy as the character describes the frustration of knowing what to say but freezing up in meetings.
- Sets up the dramatic payoff by teasing a practical solution that actually works.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
What Supernova Did for My Career
Honestly
poor English at work
almost ruined my confidence
Every meeting
I knew what to say
but the words just wouldn't come out
until I found something that actually worked

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अब phone पर scroll करने के बजाय, मैं रोज़ 10 minutes Supernova app पर बिताता हूँ। [Now, instead of scrolling on my phone, I spend 10 minutes a day on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: ये app आपको real-life situations के लिए तैयार करता है, जैसे office meetings, interviews या दोस्तों से बात करना। [This app prepares you for real-life situations, like office meetings, interviews, or talking to friends.]
Character A says: यहाँ रटना नहीं है। आप AI tutor के साथ तब तक speaking practice करते हैं जब तक English natural ना लगने लगे। [There's no memorizing here. You practice speaking with an AI tutor until English starts feeling natural.]
Character A says: सच कहूँ तो, this is a total game changer. [Honestly, this is a total game changer.]
Character A says: अब मैं confidently English बोलता हूँ, and people actually listen. [Now I speak English confidently, and people actually listen.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as a practical, daily habit requiring just 10 minutes a day, replacing mindless scrolling.
- Highlights core brand features: practicing real-life scenarios (meetings, interviews) with an AI tutor instead of rote memorization.
- Delivers the emotional payoff: sounding fluent, feeling confident, and finally commanding respect from peers.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SPEAK 20 TOPICS IN 20 DAYS
(10-15 minutes a day to sound natural and confident)
DAY 1: Introduce Yourself & Talk About Your Hometown
DAY 2: Daily Routine & Morning Habits
DAY 3: Work, Career Goals & Job Interviews
DAY 4: Technology in Everyday Life
DAY 5: Fitness, Health & Well-being
DAY 6: Food, Cooking & Eating Habits
DAY 7: Travel, Vacations & Dream Destinations
DAY 8: Home, Living Space & Comfort
DAY 9: Environment & Modern Lifestyle
DAY 10: Culture, Art & Hobbies
DAY 11: Music, Movies & Books You Love
DAY 12: Sports & Free Time
DAY 13: Shopping & Money Habits
DAY 14: Media, News & Social Trends
DAY 15: Science & The Future
DAY 16: Festivals, Holidays & Celebrations
DAY 17: Business, Startups & The Future of Work
DAY 18: Public Services & Volunteering
DAY 19: Your Life Goals & Future Plans
DAY 20: Review & Reflection
Now, instead of scrolling on my phone
I spend just 10 minutes a day on Supernova
an app that helps you master one real topic at a time
like meetings, small talk, or presentations
You don't memorize
You practice speaking until it feels natural
And honestly, it's a total game changer
I sound fluent, confident, and people actually listen

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear and direct Call to Action (CTA).
- Reinforces the Supernova brand name and core value proposition as an AI-powered English coach.
- Encourages immediate app download.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova App
AI-powered English coach
DOWNLOAD NOW
